85635.title: Zapp's Spaceship of Love
85635.description: 2025 sucked. We all know it; it was basically the worst year ever. However, like any bold, tanned leader with blond wispy hair, our beloved Captain heard this claim and promptly responded: "Hold my Slurm®." Captain Zapp has thus established the "Department About Ruining Everything", and needs the worst, most poorly trained group of individuals imaginable to run it into the ground. Think you're the worst person for the job and will only make the world a worse place than it already is? Come in, apply, and if you're right, we'll give you the job on the spot!

87800.title: Alexandria RPG Library Presents: Classic, Modern & Indie RPGs
87800.description:
Visit the Alexandria RPG Library and explore over a thousand RPG rulebooks, modules, and player aids from countless game systems. From classic D&D to indie darlings, from cyberpunk noir to magical pirates. We bring all the dice, maps, books, and supplies for you to play in or run a game.

Browse our books, roll up a character, or grab a ticket to join our events. Tickets for each day’s games are available in-person at the RPG Library (Arch Tower, Tahoma 4) at 10AM.

The Alexandria RPG Library is a 501(c)(3) non-profit based in Tacoma, Wash.

87811.title: Board Game Library - Presented by Dragonflight Game Con
87811.description:
Since 1980, Dragonflight Game Con has been introducing board game enthusiasts to a wide variety of games through their convention's extensive lending library of games. Now, you can experience that library here at Sakura-Con! Visit the Dragonflight Game Library in the Board and RPG Gaming Room, located on the Tahoma level of the Gaming Annex, to browse the collection of available games, check out a game, and play in the room's free-play area.

Dragonflight Game Con is a nonprofit, volunteer-run gaming convention that takes place every August in Bellevue, WA. Visit their website at https://dfgamecon.org/ to learn more.

87149.title: Yakuza Cult Classics: Three Films by Seijun Suzuki
87149.description: Director Seijun Suzuki (1923–2017) took yakuza b-movies to surreal and absurdist heights that continue to enthrall audiences and inspire moviemakers worldwide. Get a primer on this midcentury expressionist with three of his films: "Youth of the Beast" (1963), "Tokyo Drifter" (1966), and "Branded to Kill" (1967).

87761.title: Break!!RPG: A Completely Normal Adventure
87761.description:
"The peaceful domain of Millbrook faces its darkest hour. A monstrous beast stalks the woods, leaving destruction in its wake. The just Lord Vance grieves for his kidnapped daughter, Princess Helena, taken from her very tower. His scheming Vizier whispers plots in shadowed halls while a mad street prophet warns of apocalyptic doom. Anarchists stir in the taverns, an orphan child claims mythic power, and a traveling merchant dealing in secrets watches it all unfold with knowing eyes. 

You've been called to save the princess, slay the beast, and restore order to this troubled land. It should be simple, every hero knows this story. But as you peel back the layers of Millbrook's tragedy, you'll find things are not as they seem. 

Even monsters, they say, can love.

Expect twists, moral complexity, and the chance to either prevent-or survive-a spectacular disaster.
---
Game Host: Mia
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87694.title: Riftbound - Learn to Play
87694.description:
Riftbound! A TCG based off of the world of League of Legends, but this time in physical card form! A brand new game from UVS Games & Riot Games, Riftbound provides League of Legends gameplay without the searing rage of going 0/8/3 on Summoner's Rift. Unfortunately when your opponent defeats you however, you will not be able to brush it off as 'support diff'. On the other hand, if you win you experience the joy that can only be obtained from getting 22 kills as Garen while the enemy top laner prays for the surrender vote to succeed.

All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

Disclaimer: Riftbound is very new, extremely popular, and impossible to get product for, so unfortunately we will not have anything extra to send you home with, sorry!

86981.title: Using J-fashion in Cosplay
86981.description: A J-fashion lovers guide to more sustainable cosplay! Members of the PDX J-Fashion community are here to share tips and tricks on how to combine the two and expand your wardrobe for both at the same time! 87097.title: Disability in Wuthering Waves
87097.description: Many anime and games tie in physical or psychological drawbacks to balance out their characters' superpowers; the open-world, post-apocalyptic gacha game Wuthering Waves takes this a step further. Main characters and NPCs alike exhibit a wide spectrum of conditions that echo real-word disabilities, which are closely integrated with the game's worldbuilding and storytelling. This panel explores the depth and breadth of Wuthering Waves's disability rep, analyzes how different in-game cultures deal with disability, and affirms the value of thoughtful representation through the eyes of disabled players.

85707.title: Husky Wushu
85707.description: Wushu is a Chinese martial art and international sport derived from hundreds of years of traditional Chinese Kung Fu. Husky Wushu has been an active club at UW since 2009, with a mission to foster an inclusive community around the practice of Chinese martial arts. We will be performing a medley of individual forms, group forms and fight sets, including hand forms and weapon forms such as sword, staff, and fan. We'll be doing a workshop after our performance, so stick around to learn some skills from us!

85685.title: Free Build Session
85685.description: There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

87734.title: D&D 5e (2024): Eight Kolbolds and a Baby (dragon): An Intro adventure
87734.description:
"You have been hired to find and return the egg of a friendly copper dragon.
 A band of kobolds recently stole said egg and brought it to a nearby cave to eat. But when the egg hatched, and a screeching dragon wyrmling emerged, the kobolds quickly realized they bit off more than they could chew. The kobolds then tried to appease the fussy wyrmling with treasure, but they just can’t agree on what to do next. Should they return the wyrmling to its nest? Should they raise it themselves? They don't know what to do! The choice of how best to handle these draconic thieves? Now that is up to you! 
This is a lighthearted intro meant to take 100-110 minutes and give a taste of most D&D mechanics
---
Game Host: Courtney V
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players age 6 and up)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87795.title: Pathfinder Society: Bounty 1 - Whitefang Wyrm
87795.description:
"A Pathfinder Bounty designed for 1st-level characters.
In the frigid region known as the Crown of the World, people from diverse cultures and backgrounds must all band together to survive the long nights of winter and deadly thaws of spring. The way of life of these hardy frontier folk is now threatened by a serpentine creature that slips in during the dead of night and empties their nets of fish and their smoking racks of fresh meat. Unable and unwilling to let this theft stand, the people of the tiny northern town of Aaminiut have placed a bounty on the creature known locally as ""the Whitefange Wyrm"".
---
Game Host: Mike
Session duration: 3 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This Pathfinder session is hosted by the Pathfinder Society Emerald City Lodge. To sign up for this game, see the RPG signup desk in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

86485.description: Wotagei is a Japanese light stick dance famously seen in Oshi no Ko. Sakuraka, Seattle's own wotagei team, will showcase the art form and also teach you a basic skill so you too can dance to your favorite J-music!

87103.title: Heroes of Watching Heroes of Cosplay
87103.description: As unironic fans of Heroes of Cosplay, we know a little too much about the various circumstances surrounding this 2013 Syfy reality show which follows a group of cosplayers as they compete in contests. That doesn't mean we don't love making jabs at it either. Join us as we watch two of our favorite episodes as we playfully tease, info dump and laugh our way through this amazing piece of cosplay history.

86703.title: Mecha History and Cultural Impact: Now on Blu-Ray!
86703.description: From the beginning of modern anime, there have been robots. But where did the word "robot" come from? When did they become giant, and where did the word Mecha come from? Just how giant can they get, and how powerful? What should I watch if I'm curious, but totally unfamiliar? What is Tokusatsu, and how does it relate to Power Rangers? If you've ever had any of these questions, this is a good place to get them answered! The history goes back farther than you would believe, and the impact on culture spreads farther than you would expect!

86798.title: Anime Dumpster Diving: How to Find Your Next Hidden Gem
86798.description: There's usually a handful of anime every year that almost everyone knows about, but what about the rest? Which ones are worth watching, and how do you find them? Come learn how to "dumpster dive" for anime; find the shows that nobody knows about, and make an informed decision whether or not they will be for you. Not every show in the dumpster will be worth your time, but there's almost definitely some "hidden gems" lying in there just waiting to be discovered.

87151.title: Hair, Hue, and Heroism: Blackness in Anime Aesthetics
87151.description: Skin tone, hair, style, culture... sometimes anime gets it, sometimes… not so much. “Hair, Hue, and Heroism” is a high-energy exploration of Black representation in anime and fandom. AC Mateen will break down why “accuracy policing” often excludes us, and how Black fans use cosplay, fanart, and community remixing to claim visibility, joy, and power. Expect laughs, insights, and a celebration of the ways Black fandom is leveling up the aesthetics game.

Learn about interesting places to visit in Japan if you’re a fan of these ancient warriors!

87720.title: Call of Cthulhu: The Son of Nyx (Nyukusu No Musuko)
87720.description:
"The year is 2098 and you are crew on the spaceship Sakigake conducting a mineral survey on the surface of Pluto. But when you begin your journey back to earth, disaster strikes. A red-black swirling celestial body crashes into Pluto causing untold destruction. The last thing you see before losing consciousness are the eyes of an unspeakable cosmic horror rising from the chaos. Can you escape your doom and return to earth? Find out in this scenario straight from Japan from their number one TTRPG Call of Cthulhu! New players welcome, pregens provided.
---
Game Host: AJ
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: 18+

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87768.title: Invincible (Free League): Metro Mayhem!
87768.description:
"Omni-Man has just left Earth (never to return?), and the Guardians of the Globe have their hands full dealing with all the villains who think there’s no one who can stop them. That means it’s up to you to investigate when Cecil hears word that the gangster Machine Head has recruited the Mauler Twins to clone … something. Find out what the Maulers are up to, foil Machine Head’s plan, whatever it may be, and try to make it back home in one piece. The world can’t afford to lose any more heroes.

In this adventure from the upcoming Invincible RPG Starter Set, take on the role of a young hero straight from the pages of the Invincible comics and show, struggling to make a difference and survive long enough to see the fruits or your labor. No experience with the Year Zero game system or familiarity with the world of Invincible is needed.
---

87058.title: An Ethical Analysis of My Hero Academia
87058.description: It's been 12 years, 4 movies, and 3 distinct epilogues since My Hero Academia was originally published. But what did it all MEAN? Together, we will approach the series earnestly and seriously as a work of literature and perform a holistic and comprehensive reading of the manga, spin-offs, and all supplementary texts. This will allow us to answer: Does the My Hero Academia franchise endorse a specific Normative Ethical Theory? (Expect full spoilers for all related media.)

86983.title: Name that Daddy
86983.description: From the makers of “Ranking Anime’s Ultimate FBoys: Who's the King of the Island?” “Brace yourselves for the ultimate “Name That Daddy” quiz show. Contestants must identify mystery dads using cursed screenshots, clues, and hints like “gives off major ‘I left for milk’ energy” or “could solo the multiverse but can’t attend a parent-teacher conference.” Expect panic-buzzing, unhelpful hints, plot twists no custody court could handle, and at least one Daddy that makes you scream “That’s not a Dad, that’s a Zaddy”

86800.description: Joann's is no longer with us, meaning that often times youll be turning to online shopping for all you fabric needs. Come learn how to make sure your getting the right fabric the first time! Learn about different fibers, weaves and weights and how they are marketed and tagged by online retailers. We will also discuss dye batches, price comparisons and the slight differences in fabric types that make all the difference in making your cosplay.

Join us for a special screening of Episode 1 and the Global Premiere of Episode 2 of the TV anime Snowball Earth!

Based on the manga by Yuhiro Tsujitsugu, Snowball Earth depicts a breathtaking, ice-covered future Earth brought to life through stunning animation and a powerful narrative. This special panel offers fans the rare opportunity to experience the very beginning of the series ahead of its global streaming.

Don’t miss this exclusive chance to witness the birth of Snowball Earth and receive a giveaway!

85686.title: Free Build Session
85686.description: There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

85022.title: The Floral Court Invitational: A Sakura-Con Nerd Prom
85022.description:
Prepare for an evening where elegance blossoms and fandom flourishes! Sakura-Con proudly presents the Floral Court Invitational, an exclusive Nerd Prom event designed for those who dance to the beat of their own heart.

Step into a night of sophisticated celebration, where the vibrant spirit of anime and manga meets the timeless grace of a formal ball. Adorn your finest attire—whether it’s a stunning gown, a sharp suit, or the impeccably formal wear of your favorite character. This is your chance to shine, mingle with fellow enthusiasts, and create unforgettable memories under a canopy of cherry blossoms.

Be Crowned a Sakura Flower Messenger! The highlight of the evening is our prestigious Sakura Flower Messenger Contest. Aspiring envoys of elegance will showcase their unique style, grace, and passion for the Sakura-Con spirit. Judges will be seeking individuals who embody charm, poise, and a profound appreciation for our community. The chosen Flower Messengers will hold a place of honor, representing the beauty and camaraderie of Sakura-Con.

Indulge in an enchanting atmosphere, enjoy delightful music, and take to the dance floor as we celebrate our shared love for all things anime, manga, and Japanese culture. Join us for the Floral Court Invitational – where every dance is a story, and every attendee is part of a grand tradition!

Judges will be seeking individuals who embody charm, poise, and a profound appreciation for our community. The chosen Flower Messengers will hold a place of honor, representing the beauty and camaraderie of Sakura-Con. Indulge in an enchanting atmosphere, enjoy delightful music, and take to the dance floor as we celebrate our shared love for all things anime, manga, and Japanese culture. Join us for the Floral Court Invitational – where every dance is a story, and every attendee is part of a grand tradition!

87665.title: Pokemon TCG – Free Build & Battle Event
87665.description:
Oh, it’s all very fine and well to take your carefully-curated team to victory – but someone who’s true Champion material has that special something that lets them bond with a team they’ve only just met, intuitively understand their strengths and weaknesses, and lead them to glory.

How do you develop a talent like that, you ask?

Why, many rounds of Build & Battle, of course! Assemble your deck from the contents of the provided Build & Battle Box, and battle your way to to the top of the mountain… or at least to a good time. All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

86935.title: Your Babygirl is Mid 2: We Got a Bigger Room This Time
86935.description: You’ve heard of “Your Waifu is Trash”, now get ready for “Your Babygirl is Mid”. You may have seen the term floating around fandom and found yourself asking: what does "babygirl" mean? Why are most of the characters I see being referred to as babygirl middle aged men? Why are they so sad? Well worry not--our panel of experts are here to provide the definitive guide on what makes a character a babygirl, as well as outline common misconceptions around its use. With such guiding traits as “old”, “has issues”, and “wanting to see them in a maid dress”, by the end of this panel you’re sure to have the tools you need to find the babygirl that’s right for you. For those who made it in last year: this presentation will have the same bones as 2025, but be updated with some fun new surprises!

86531.title: Melodies of life (Final Fantasy Music Trivia)
86531.description: Few gaming franchises have shaped the soundscape of the industry quite like Final Fantasy. From the joyful rhythm of a Chocobo ride to the triumphant swell of the Victory Fanfare, the series’ iconic themes have become an emotional soundtrack for generations of fans. Crafted by legendary composers such as Nobuo Uematsu, Yoko Shimomura, and many more, these pieces are woven into the very identity of the franchise—its true Melodies of Life. In this interactive panel, attendees will put their musical memory to the test. Join us as contestants listen, guess, and compete to see whether the timeless music of Final Fantasy still resonates in the hearts of its most devoted fans. Whether you’re a seasoned Warrior of Light or a newcomer drawn by nostalgia, come celebrate the magic, history, and harmony of one of gaming’s greatest legacies.

87775.title: Maid: The Roleplaying Game: Meido Honor: Mistress Needs Wedding Badly!
87775.description:
"Love is up in the air, as the mistress is down a suitor and needs to marry next week to keep her mansion. For the sake of your honor as a maid...ahem, for true love's sake...can you save the occasion, and your job?

Ah, weddings, the happiest day of a blushing bride's life! At least, that's how your mistress's parents see it. They've been pushing her to settle down and marry a proper suitor, or else lose ownership of her mansion. And now, her suitor's gone...and worse, your employment is in danger!

So, one way or another, it's up to you to make sure the wedding bells ring for mistress. Will you track down the missing suitor? Set her up with a blind date? Forge nuptial papers? Dress up a life-size mannequin to walk the aisle with her? Help her parents find a change of heart? Or even...make her fall in love with one of her maids?
---
Game Host: Saoirse
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: 18+ (vulgar humor, sexual references, slapstick violence)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

86802.title: Bring Back "Bad" Cosplay! How the Cosplay Community has Changed.
86802.description: Cosplaying is a great way to express your creative side, but with the rise of social media, the community has seen some changes. Many older cosplayers will tell you that over the years, cosplaying has started to turn more into a competition rather than a fun hobby. While this can be a great thing, it can also deter people from entering the community. So how do we keep the cosplay world a welcoming place? Bring back “bad” cosplaying! Join cosplayers DuelGirlLizzy and NezzerCosplay along with photographer Candra Designs to discuss the cosplaying world. Here we will talk about the struggles of entering the hobby, how it is ok and normal to not be a “perfect” cosplayer right out the gate, and how we have grown from our own trials and errors. This is a space to learn and find a community, we hope to see you there!

The only thing standing in your way is a labyrinth of a graveyard and the feeling that something is tethered to your spirit. Fight, claw, and blast your way through undead to reach the man you're hunting with the Daggerheart system! --- Game Host: Eden Session duration: 4 hours Age rating: Teen (13+) This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87751.title: Exalted Essence: Ghostbusters
87751.description:
"A remote village has lost contact with the regular ghost trading caravans, and have called a grip group of investigator exorcists to investigate.

Do you want to speak to and bring peace to the dead? Do you want to ensure all ghosts can thrive in their unlife? Are you seeking to help mortals against the supernatural threats of the cold North? Come play divine weapons defending and investigating in the cold, remote North.

CW ghosts, death and despair ( with the power to fight and fix them), undead, grave desecration.

No experience with Exalted, Exalted Essence, or Storytelling System games needed, all materials provided at the table.

---
Game Host: Jeremy Gwinner
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87740.description:
"Discover the world of Fallout from the pacific northwest. See how the world has changed and stayed the same. Find out why the city is called the emerald city, what is the needle and deal with different raiders.

87777.title: Monster of the Week : The Curse of Whispering Pines
87777.description:
"Love dark modern fantasy? Love wacky punk antics? Then you'll love Monster of the Week! Each party memeber picks one role to form their team of radical monster hunters!

""The small town of Whispering Pines, WV was once a picturesque site along winding state roads where city folks would drive up to take photos of the fall colors as the dense forest trees turned in the autumn. In recent years, however, strange disappearances have left the otherwise-peaceful town worried that someone dangerous is on the loose."" 
---
Game Host: Silver Pendragon
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: 18+ I like to get a tad edgy :3

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87729.title: Ryuutama: Let’s Get Cooking – A Delicious In Dungeon Inspired Adventure
87729.description:
"Calling all dungeon delvers with an appetite for adventure! You and your party are tasked with eating your way through the dungeon one monster at a time. Cook up your kills and see how it effects your skills. Will you create a stat-boosting feast, or flop with status-effecting slop? This snack-sized session utilizes a slightly modified version of the Japanese TTRPG system Ryuutama. Bring your imagination and let's get cooking!
---
Game Host: Camille
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players age 6 and up)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87801.title: Alexandria RPG Library Presents: Classic, Modern & Indie RPGs
87801.description:
Visit the Alexandria RPG Library and explore over a thousand RPG rulebooks, modules, and player aids from countless game systems. From classic D&D to indie darlings, from cyberpunk noir to magical pirates. We bring all the dice, maps, books, and supplies for you to play in or run a game.

Browse our books, roll up a character, or grab a ticket to join our events. Tickets for each day’s games are available in-person at the RPG Library (Arch Tower, Tahoma 4) at 10AM.

The Alexandria RPG Library is a 501(c)(3) non-profit based in Tacoma, Wash.

87812.title: Board Game Library - Presented by Dragonflight Game Con
87812.description:
Since 1980, Dragonflight Game Con has been introducing board game enthusiasts to a wide variety of games through their convention's extensive lending library of games. Now, you can experience that library here at Sakura-Con! Visit the Dragonflight Game Library in the Board and RPG Gaming Room, located on the Tahoma level of the Gaming Annex, to browse the collection of available games, check out a game, and play in the room's free-play area.

Dragonflight Game Con is a nonprofit, volunteer-run gaming convention that takes place every August in Bellevue, WA. Visit their website at https://dfgamecon.org/ to learn more.

86776.title: Frankensteining Patterns for Cosplay
86776.description: Creating cosplays can be a challenge, from patterning to sewing & more. It can be even more of a challenge to know where to start. Join Hylian Cream, a Master Level Cosplayer, Sewing educator & Janome Maker, in learning how to Frankenstein commercial sewing patterns into the perfect fit for your next cosplay build! This panel will include interactive elements and go over important, beginner friendly details to help you get started.

86667.description: We are pleased to present ""Your Waifu/Husbando is Trash"" for an older audience. Come for the same entertainment, laughs and prizes as the SC-13 panel...but spicier!

86937.title: Emporio Ivankov's One Piece Game Show
86937.description: Hear ye, hear ye all citizens of Kamabakka kingdom! Here on Momoiro Island we have planned an exciting event for fans of One Piece. Emporio Ivankov, your queen, has summed you to show off your knowledge of the One Piece universe and have an opportunity to snag fantastic prizes. There will be discussions, debates and most important of all a chance to grace your queen with your presence. Don't be shy, can't wait to see you there.

87155.title: Fight For Your Right To Fanservice
87155.description: The world is becoming increasingly hostile to NSFW content, with active censorship efforts on the rise. However, could anime fanservice stand as one of the last bastions of resistance? Join an author and former adult industry professional for a Q&A about the actions we can take as fans and creators to keep our spice free from censorship and 'on main'.

87107.description: Come to an interactive panel where you, yes YOU, get to decide whether an iconic Tumblr sexyman is a “smash” or a “pass,” and defend that choice to your fellow attendees.

87379.title: Most Loved in Deepspace — A Love and Deepspace Game Show (18+)
87379.description: Calling all Deepspace Hunters! Come and join a fun and interactive fan panel that will feature quiz and poll-based questions with real-time answering from the audience. This Trivia Trial will cover a variety of serious, silly and spicy topics to test your knowledge—and love—of the otome game, along with some special guests who might have a thing or two to say about these questions. It will be a celebration of our most loved LADS boys with fellow fans and a chance to win some prizes.

85687.title: Free Build Session
85687.description: There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

86559.description: Do you like vocaloid/vocalsynths music and want to learn how to make them? We will go through some basic vocaloid terminology. Then let's make a vocaloid song together! Will it be a hit, or will it flop? No matter, let's have fun!

86629.title: Persona 30th Anniversary Fan Panel
86629.description: The Persona series started 30 years ago with Revelations: Persona back on the original PlayStation and now has become one of the biggest series coming out of Japan. This panel will be a fun look back over the past three decades with a room full of fellow fans. This will cover video games, anime, manga, music, and much much more. As well offering plenty of trivia questions with lots of prizes to giveaway.

87537.title: Gundam Wing: Endless Duel Tournament
87537.description: Round 2 of Gundam Animayhem! The SNES Gundam fighter that goes incredibly hard. Deathscythe, Wing Zero, and more in fast-paced mecha combat. Win prizes!
87537.description_display: Round 2 of Gundam Animayhem! The SNES Gundam fighter that goes incredibly hard. Deathscythe, Wing Zero, and more in fast-paced mecha combat. Win prizes!

87695.title: Riftbound - Learn to Play
87695.description:
Riftbound! A TCG based off of the world of League of Legends, but this time in physical card form! A brand new game from UVS Games & Riot Games, Riftbound provides League of Legends gameplay without the searing rage of going 0/8/3 on Summoner's Rift. Unfortunately when your opponent defeats you however, you will not be able to brush it off as 'support diff'. On the other hand, if you win you experience the joy that can only be obtained from getting 22 kills as Garen while the enemy top laner prays for the surrender vote to succeed.

All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

Disclaimer: Riftbound is very new, extremely popular, and impossible to get product for, so unfortunately we will not have anything extra to send you home with, sorry!

87641.title: Flesh and Blood - Free Draft Night Party!
87641.description:
Swing big for a knockout as cheers and boos amp up the volume in this Super Slam booster draft! Build a deck on the fly as a face (Revered) or heel (Reviled) to play in a limited environment that will 100% surprise you with its technical depth and intricacies. Brownie points if you watched that one SuperEyePatch Wolf video that uses anime to explain pro wrestling! Also we respect Brody King in this house.  All participants also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

BONUS: If you see a bald guy in a power-chair (Or just ask for Stein) and tell him your favorite wrestler, he'll give you an extra promo card! 

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

86707.title: Umamusume Horse-Story - Legends on the Track
86707.description: Whether you're just making your debut in the Uma world or if you're already a top trainer, saddle up for a trip through Umamusume history! In this panel, you'll learn the real life stories of Japan's most iconic racehorses. Behind every Umamusume is a horse racing legend - together, we'll race through the triumphs and heartbreaks of their careers, and learn how they shaped the personalities of our favorite trainees. Every race tells a story - and we can't wait to share them!

87062.title: Can I Show You My Fav? - Oshikatsu Yap Session
87062.description: From itabags, itasha, nuikatsu, character parties, cupsleeve events and more - we are here to show you all the tips and tricks we know on how to have a collection that makes other jealous and help you get your collection out of boxes that never see the light of day. Sharing our love of fandom and get your own creative juices flowing. We would love to see your projects as well and if you would like to share them with audience. All levels of energy and interest welcome.

86669.title: FanDUMBS: A Fair & Balanced Analysis
86669.description: We all can agree that fandom is cursed. All fandom. Any fandom. Yes, even your fandom. But why is that? What makes fandom the worst possible thing that a person can be invested in besides NFTs? Learn more as your completely normal and not-at-all-cringey hosts guide you through the history of bad fandom, regrets, and MAYBE how we can prevent this from happening to future fandoms.

86523.title: Hot Anime Men in Your Area
86523.description: Do you like a good daddy? Lets talk about it. We're back and better than ever. Come talk with us as we define what makes a good daddy, and what differentiates them from other male archetypes. Join us as we pick at your favorite characters and decide if they are a daddy, a baby girl, a male wife or maybe something more.

87199.title: Into the Mochiverse: The Creation of Vanitas no Carte, Pandora Hearts, and More
87199.description: Jun Mochizuki, also known as Mochijun, is the manga-ka of Pandora Hearts, Vanitas no Carte, and the lesser known Crimson Shell. But where did it all start? And where has it come since the beginning? This panel will be a deep dive into the timeline of Mochijun's work since before her debut until current time. We will be talking about the franchises as a whole including manga, anime, and even drama CDs. Good for new fans and old fans alike!

87109.title: Cinderella Must Die: The Villainess Isekai Power Fantasy
87109.description: Every heroine needs a villainess – who else will be there to drop cutting comments, spill wine on ber dress, and foam at the mouth as she rises through the ranks of society? A good villainess is a deeply compelling character; the overwhelming success of villainess manga stands as proof of that. But when the duke’s daughter takes the role of female lead, what does that say about the commoners left behind? Together, let’s examine the implicit idea often buried in this power fantasy – shouldn’t Cinderella have known her place?

86709.title: Cultural Cross Polination
86709.description: What's the most obscure reference you've ever seen in a cartoon, or anime, or a TV show? Remember when South Park had a full episode about Pokemon? Or when FLCL had a few seconds done in South Park's style? That's what this panel is all about. References, homages, parodies, back and forth, east to west, west to east. It goes back further than you'd think, and in many cases recently, it comes full circle where homages are being referenced, and made into whole new references!

87247.title: Exploring Motherhood in Arcane
87247.description: What if Arcane didn’t stop at the question: “is there anything so undoing as a daughter?” We’re asking: is there anything so undoing as a mother? From unpacking how their roles shape the narrative, to defining what makes someone (or something) a mother, join us in our hexploration of maternal themes in Arcane. Don’t forget to stick around for some freebies after the panel!

Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players age 6 and up)

87111.title: A Retrospective on the NaruSaku NaruHina Wars
87111.description: In years past we suffered in the great ship wars. Before Naruto finished and none of us could agree on who would end up with Naruto or Sasuke we turned on each other. "Sakura's useless!" "Hinata's creepy!" We cried... But in the end we must truly ask ourselves as we look back, "Why can't they both be hot?" Come with me on this journey, a retrospective on the ship war.

85094.title: Zapp's Spaceship of Love: Loveline!
85094.description: Have you been catfished by an AI Chatbot? Do you have Love in Deep Space installed, or worse yet, tell people you do? Have you gone to a comedy relationship advice panel and taken what they said seriously? If you answered yes to any of these questions; then that's really embarrassing. Thankfully, we're here for you on a purely plutonic level! No question is too stupid, too lewd, too real or too fake, so bring us your hardest hitting and most debilitating relationship questions, and we will answer them for you, satisfaction guaranteed and sometimes in song, or your money back!

86989.title: SAKURA-MIKU EXPO: A Fanmade Vocaloid Concert
86989.description: Can’t make it to MIKU EXPO 2026 coming to Seattle this April? Don’t worry! This fan-made concert spectacular is here to cure your FOMO! Get your glowsticks ready, because "SAKURA-MIKU EXPO" is here to bring Japan's favorite virtual idol to the con with a lovingly crafted performance of her most iconic songs. Featuring a setlist of Miku’s biggest songs, this show recreates the energy and spectacle of a real Vocaloid live concert, made by the fans, FOR the fans! Glowsticks encouraged! Note: This is a completely fan-produced, non-commercial event. Hatsune Miku is the property of Crypton Future Media. This concert is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Crypton Future Media or any official Miku Expo organizers. All content presented is used under fair use principles and is intended solely as a fan tribute, designed to give attendees a special Miku experience of their own. WARNING: THIS SHOW WILL CONTAIN LOUD MUSIC, BUT MAY CONTAIN FLASHING LIGHTS OR IMAGES THAT MAY NOT BE SUITABLE FOR ATTENDEES WITH PHOTOSENSITIVE EPILEPSY - DISCRETION ADVISED

87607.title: Overnight TCG Freeplay - Friday Night
87607.description:
Did you just get out of the Rave, or a late-night panel, perhaps? Are you looking to still have some fun at the Con overnight? Well, if you brought your own cards, we've got space! The TCG Room may close its outer doors at midnight, but we have a number of free-play tables available for BYO style play. Want to jam out some 2 AM Commander? We got you.

This area is not staffed between the hours of Midnight and 9 AM. All tables are available for use, but we ask that you please clean up after yourselves and behave responsibly in the game space. Failure to comply with this is a violation of intergalactic law. Thank you, and see you bright and early for more scheduled content!

87605.title: DRAW PHASE Presents TCGs @ Sakura-Con - Saturday
87605.description:
Welcome to the Sakura-Con x DRAW PHASE 2026 Trading Card Games room! We'll be running totally FREE events wall to wall all weekend long, from Learn to Play events, to Drafts, Sealed, Constructed, and more for some of your favorite games! Any event you do in the room will earn you a ticket that you can jealously hoard until Sunday when we have our Grand Giveaway, full of prizes generously donated by our lovely sponsors, donors, and friends. 

Whether you're a seasoned pro or a you've never played a card game in your life, we'll have content for you! Come learn a game you have always wanted to play or one you've never even heard of. And best of all, every single thing in this room is FREE! So if you want to come hang out with your fellow con-goer, meet some new friends and learn some fun games along the way, our team of dedicated volunteers will be here all weekend to guide you through the wonderful world of cardboard.

85722.title: Discover the Sound of Traditional Japanese Harps
85722.description: Join our interactive panel presenting beautiful Japanese music!Koto no WA, ensemble of local koto (Japanese harp) musicians in the Greater Seattle Area, will play both traditional and contemporary songs, including some songs from anime series. This workshop will be a combination of live demonstrations, a brief history lesson on Japanese music culture, Q & A sessions, and a hands-on experience with the koto. Don’t miss this rare opportunity to experience Japan’s traditional string instrument with more than a thousand years of history.

87159.title: In Defense of the Legend of Korra
87159.description: The Legend of Korra (or "LoK" or "Korra" for short) is generally considered a disappointing sequel to the widely beloved Avatar: The Last Airbender, even catching a consistent ire among some fans. However, that perspective overlooks much of the incredible context in which this show was made as well as the numerous groundbreaking elements that shaped animation today. This panel goes beyond the typical "fan panel" and goes deep into the context in which Korra was created, working in the Nickelodeon system, paying homage to much of its original source material, and the strides that built upon its beloved predecessor as a stand-alone property. In sum, Korra might not be better than A:TLA, but a case can easily be made for why it's great. This panel is hosted by someone who you are likely to see at the front of the queue of every Q&A line, and a certain 'Month', who you likely will hear clopping around cons as a horse to a legendary king.

86711.title: Kanto Pokemon Food Web
86711.description: Have you ever been curious about what Pokémon eat out in the wild? Well look no further than this presentation. Learn about what a food web created using the first generation of Pokémon would look like. It shows which Pokémon might prey on each other and how their size, typing and inspiration might affect that. It also tells us which species might be major producers, apex predators, or keystone species. Additionally we will be discussing what exactly a food web is, how it differs from a food chain, how Pokémon were categorized in order to put them onto the food web and how environmental factors change which Pokémon are included.

86744.title: The 5 W's of Sumo - A Factual (But Fun!) Guide to the Basics
86744.description: Sumo is having a resurgence of popularity in Japan, thanks to new and powerful young wrestlers, but getting into the sport can be confusing. Who are all of these people? What are they doing? What are those poses?! Was that a FACE SLAP? Is that allowed??? Where are their clothes?!?! Why was this even invented? Let's run through the basics of this religious-ceremony-turned-national-sport to answer all of these questions and more!

86631.title: Transitioning Humanity: This Is Not A Man
86631.description: What do Arcane, Creature Commandos, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, and The Witch from Mercury have in common? All four explore the ethics and effects of human augmentation – of transhumanism. They ask how far science and technology can take humanity, and whether the cost is worth it. Join us for an in-depth examination of these new transhumanist narratives, how (if) they’ve been updated for our modern age, and where these shows draw the line on humanity.

87788.title: Pathfinder Society: Tanuki Trouble [PFS2 Q24]
87788.description:
"A Pathfinder Society Quest designed for 1st- through 4th-level characters, playable in 2-3 hours.
During the Year of Unfettered Exploration, the reappearance of the planes of metal and wood destabilized the Maze of the Open Road, the extradimensional maze the Pathfinder Society uses to transport personnel and goods across vast distances. In trying to stabilize itself, new entrances and exits appeared, one in a Tanuki village in Minkai. The tanuki had some fun pranking travelers in the maze until some Pathfinder agents defeated them at their own games. Now the village is on good terms with the Society, but the Pathfinders would like to have a lodge in the village to oversee this new exit. The tanuki are amenable, but only if the Pathfinders do some favors for them first. Of course the PCs are the ones tasked with these favors.
---
Game Host: Nick H
Session duration: 3 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This Pathfinder session is hosted by the Pathfinder Society Emerald City Lodge. To sign up for this game, see the RPG signup desk in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

Visit the Dragonflight Game Library in the Board and RPG Gaming Room, located on the Tahoma level of the Gaming Annex, to browse the collection of available games, check out a game, and play in the room's free-play area.

Dragonflight Game Con is a nonprofit, volunteer-run gaming convention that takes place every August in Bellevue, WA. Visit their website at https://dfgamecon.org/ to learn more.

85715.title: An Intro to Traditional Japanese Instruments with Dekoboko Taiko
85715.description: Dekoboko Taiko invites you to learn about the rich history of traditional Japanese instruments, particularly percussion and winds, and their cultural influence in Japan and the world. This fun and interactive panel will include a performance and demonstration by members of the local Seattle group Dekoboko Taiko. Explore the festive beats of the taiko, the dancing clicks of the naruko, the lively melodies of the fue, and a few more surprises! Participants will be able to try out many of the featured instruments and enjoy a full performance from the group!

87714.description:

85689.title: Free Build Session
85689.description: There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

87746.title: Wander Witch: A Cozy RPG of Fairies and Witches: A Spoonful of Sunlight, A Saucerful of Stars
87746.description:
"As students and staff of witchery and wizardry at the vibrant Brandysprite Castle, it isn't unusual for you, your classmates, and charges to be sent as envoys to friendly fairy communities. Whether it be to gather resources, catch up on the latest tales, aid villagers, or recruit newcomers, the school trusts you to be clever, creative, and kind as you lend your aid. This time, you are responding to reports of a mysterious dreaming sickness that has taken hold in the nearby village of Gossamer. It's up to you to explore, solve riddles, and forge friendships needed to restore the easy rest of its inhabitants. Will this cozy mystery be best solved through quick wits, an open heart, or a bit of both?
---
Game Host: Jack
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players 6 and older welcome)

87666.title: Pokemon TCG – Free Build & Battle Event
87666.description:
Oh, it’s all very fine and well to take your carefully-curated team to victory – but someone who’s true Champion material has that special something that lets them bond with a team they’ve only just met, intuitively understand their strengths and weaknesses, and lead them to glory.

How do you develop a talent like that, you ask?

Why, many rounds of Build & Battle, of course! Assemble your deck from the contents of the provided Build & Battle Box, and battle your way to to the top of the mountain… or at least to a good time. All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

87732.title: Shadow Scar: Syndicate Soiree
87732.description:
"Come join the creator of the Shadow Scar TTRPG for a night of fun and festivity as you enter the Hollow Eye Masquerade! Important people from across the multiverse have been gathered together for this once in a lifetime soiree thrown by the head of the Hollow Eye Crime Syndicate, Malacoda. As ninja agents of the secretive Shadow Scar Agency you've been sent to infiltrate the party and find out what the Hollow Eye Syndicate is planning with all these important people. While you're there you'll also have to keep your eyes peeled. Intelligence suggests that you won't be the only curious party. The monstrous yokai might be sending their own agents to kidnap the guests or worse.

87251.title: Are YOU a Dinergoth?
87251.description: Anime fan? Discord native? Alt aesthetics? Dreaming of YouTube success? You might be part of a new American archetype. This panel explores the "dinergoth"—the convergence of geek fandoms, alt fashion, queerness, and downward mobility that's become the dominant youth culture of 2020s suburban and provincial America. We'll dig into why anime kids and emo kids and queer kids and neurodivergent kids are now the same kids, and what it means that this con might be the cultural center of the new American mainstream.

86943.title: Dubs are Better than Subs
86943.description: Let’s be honest, you’ve all been watching anime wrong. The community needs to give more respect to the wonderful voice actors who bring dub adaptations to life. In fact, anime is even better dubbed than subbed. From not having to read to being able to multi-task, we will explore the range of benefits offered by dubs, the superior anime viewing method.

87115.title: Intro to Fictionkin
87115.description: The term “fictionkin” describes someone who self-identifies as having a deep-seated, persistent sense of identity as a fictional person, being, species, etc. In this panel, we will explore key terms and concepts, discuss the relationship of fictionkin to fandom as a whole, and share lived experiences in the hope of reducing the stigma surrounding fictionkin. There will be ample time for questions, so bring your curious minds, listening ears, and maybe even your own experiences.

86713.title: Spoilers Ahead: Let's ruin everything!
86713.description: Some people just don’t care about spoilers. Sometimes there’s a story you’re interested in, but just don’t have time to sit down and watch or play the whole thing. Or maybe you just want to kill some time listening to someone talk about stories they really like! Whatever you come in for, you’ll have a good time! I’ve got lots of things to spoil for you, including Silent Hill F, and one of Kamen Rider's most infamous moments! There are some things that I'll only talk about in this room!

86673.description: For almost 50 years, ElfQuest has straddled the line of what defines an American comic and what defines manga. A look at the series, and why it could be considered an American manga.

86356.title: Flower Arranging with A Voice Actor (Kelsey Cruz)
86356.description: From Florist to Voice Actress - she does it all! 86563.title: The Gojo Effect
86563.description: Have you ever wondered why people are obsessed with Satoru Gojo from the series Jujutsu Kaisen? Do you, yourself, love him? Do you hate him and want to know what it is about him that has hypnotized our community? Well, join us as we explore what about him has everyone captivated and how he has impacted the history of anime/manga and society going forward.

86808.title: Exploring Origami
86808.description: Prepare yourself for an exciting hands-on introduction to origami, the Japanese-originated art of folded paper sculpture. From angles to self-similarity, bases to grafts, you'll learn about some of the fundamental principles that make up origami, and make several models in the process, from cranes to dragons. Beginners are welcome, this workshop assumes no prior folding experience.

87598.title: Star Ocean Ex Episodes 1-3
87598.description:
ANIME SHOWING (Subtitled)

Based on the video game series, the story follows Claude C. Kenni, a young officer aboard an advanced starship who is mysteriously transported to Expel, a medieval world of swords and sorcery. Mistaken for a legendary hero, Claude becomes entangled in a quest to save the planet from a looming catastrophe.

Kenni, a young officer aboard an advanced starship who is mysteriously transported to Expel, a medieval world of swords and sorcery. Mistaken for a legendary hero, Claude becomes entangled in a quest to save the planet from a looming catastrophe.

87595.title: Appleseed
87595.description:
ANIME SHOWING (1988 OVA - Subtitlted)

After World War III devastates the Earth, the utopian city of Olympus is governed largely by genetically engineered artificial humans known as Bioroids. When terrorists plot to use a powerful weapon called the “Holy Grail” to destabilize the fragile balance between humans and Bioroids, ESWAT officers Deunan Knute and the cyborg Briareos are drawn into a high-stakes conflict that threatens the future of the city.

86363.title: Diversity in Anime with Bill Butts
86363.description: Join Bill Butts as he speaks on what it’s like being a person of color working in the anime industry. There will be a Q&A period, as well as a voice acting workshop to end the panel with!
86363.description_display: Join Bill Butts as he speaks on what it’s like being a person of color working in the anime industry. There will be a Q&A period, as well as a voice acting workshop to end the panel with!

86945.title: Beyond the Print Bed: 3D Printing in Cosplay, Fabric & Fiber Arts
86945.description: Join us as we dive into how 3D printing is changing the game in cosplay, embroidery, and other crafty worlds. We’ll explore how makers are using 3D tech to quickly prototype designs, try out new materials, and perfect those tiny details before going all in. Whether you're creating a costume or adding flair to your designs, 3D printing is making it faster and more precise. Come hear how this tech is shaking up the creative process and making crafts more fun, innovative, and how you can get involved to start incorporating your own crafting style to enhance your cosplays!

86715.title: Music from Anime: Live!
86715.description: Live performance of music from some of our favorite anime; arranged for wind quintet, plus some special guest artists. There are many fantastic composers and song writers working in the realm of anime. We will be performing music by Joe Hisaishi (Studio Ghibli), Evan Call (Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End, Violet Evergarden), Yuki Kajiura (Sis Puella Magica Madoka), and more!

86565.title: Disability and Access in Witch Hat Atelier
86565.description: In the world of magic, you are either born a witch or you aren't. This is supposedly to keep people from misusing magic to harm others, but Coco and company continue to see the inequity and suffering caused and emphasized by lack of access and judgment of ability. In this panel, we'll explore how Witch Hat Atelier's whimsical story is a clear commentary on issues we experience in our world on a daily basis, and why those who need access the most are often barred from it.

Test your knowledge on idol terminology, your song recognition, and plenty of questions on various medias such as Vocaloid, Love Live!, Ensemble Stars, Project Sekai, and so much more! We'll have prizes for our Top 5 on the scoreboard, so study up!

86635.title: The GameSurge | Ultimate Video Game Trivia!
86635.description: Put your gaming knowledge on the line in the ultimate trivia showdown! From retro classics to modern masterpieces, contestants face off for bragging rights in this high-energy, crowd-powered celebration of all things video games. Survive the rounds and earn your chance to raid The Treasure Trove of Trash—where fantastic prizes (and maybe a few surprises) await. Do YOU have what it takes to claim the loot and the glory? There’s only one way to find out!

86529.title: A Study of Tatsuki Fujimoto: The Man Behind Chainsaw Man
86529.description: Following the release of 2022's Chainsaw Man, and the hit 2025 Reze Arc film, Tatsuki Fujimoto has quickly made a name for himself as one of the premier creators of the manga industry. With his bold, cinematic visual style, and gripping, eccentric storytelling, it is rare to find a creator that captures the hearts of millions of fans all over the world writing seemingly whatever he wants! If you are interested in exploring the underlying themes of works such as Chainsaw Man or Fire Punch, or even just learning some funny anecdotes from this largely mysterious figure, then join in for some lively discussion!

85690.title: Free Build Session
85690.description: There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

87630.title: Echoes of Astra - Learn to Play
87630.description:
This one's new! Echoes of Astra is a brand-new TCG from Parhelion Studios, an anime art themed game that mixes traditional TCG Gameplay with the tactical depth of war gaming! All wrapped in the package of some beautiful cardboard. If you want to learn a brand new TCG that is just starting this is your chance to get in on the ground floor! All participants will receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday!

All our materials for Echoes of Astra were graciously donated by Parhelion Studios, so a big thank you to them for allowing us to show their game to you. Come over to the TCG Room and one of our experienced volunteers will teach you all about this tactically rich, exciting new game!

87789.title: Pathfinder Society: The Chitterwood Walks, Part 2: The Battle of Logas [PFS2 7-12]
87789.description:
"With the success of the Chitterwood Talks, the goblin tribes are ready to march on Logas and put a stop to the undead attacks, with support from the Pathfinder Society. As forces approach the city, rumors start to circle of a strange plague only affecting Hellknights, leaving the undead Hellknights covered in bizarre, circular scars and bearing the mark of an unknown order. Within Logas, a Hellknight necromancer has declared herself the head of a new Hellknight order and is using the city as her chance to prove its worth. Can the Pathfinders stand up to The Order of the Open Tomb?
---
Game Host: Steven S
Session duration: 3 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This Pathfinder session is hosted by the Pathfinder Society Emerald City Lodge. To sign up for this game, see the RPG signup desk in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87797.title: Starfinder Society: The Beasts of Bo: Part One [SFS2 1-14]
87797.description:
"A Starfinder Society Scenario designed for 3rd- through 4th-level characters, playable in 2-3 hours.
Dangerous raiders called the Beasts of Bo have proven to be a thorn in the side of the Starfinder Society. Armed to the teeth with tech salvaged from the Wreck of the Returned and audacious in their convoy attacks, the Beasts of Bo are a formidable foe, yet the group may still have its uses, . Do you have the courage to stand against the Beasts of Bo? 

This is an adventure in the ongoing Invasion’s Edge metaplot, and is part one of a two-part scenario series.
---

Session duration: 3 hours

87599.title: Project A-ko
87599.description:
ANIME SHOWING (Dubbed)

When Earth faces a looming alien threat, the outrageously wealthy and arrogant B-ko is far more concerned with defeating her rival A-ko and winning the affection of their sweet, clueless friend C-ko. Armed with custom-built mecha and an army of loyal followers, B-ko wages over-the-top battles in a fast-paced parody packed with classic anime references, exaggerated superpowers, and a stylish red power suit.

91180.title: The Fabulous Furoshiki – Japanese Cloth Wrapping Techniques
91180.description: Since ancient times, the Japanese have used a simple square cloth called a furoshiki to wrap and carry anything and everything. In today’s environmentally conscious age of maximizing use and minimizing waste, the furoshiki is making a strong comeback! Learn the basics of how to use this “eco-friendly” alternative to plastic bags and wrapping paper. This is a hands-on introduction to fun and functional Japanese furoshiki wrapping techniques!

87833.description: Hello everyone and I hope you are all excited for the second annual Beyblade X tournament at Sakura Con! We have swapped up the format for this year to help people get more play time! This years tournament will be a 1v1 king of the hill, we will have 4 hills and the top players on each hill will move onto the finals for a chance at glory, and some awesome prizes! We will have loaners beyblades available for anyone new to the game and a freeplay area for anyone who just wants to play and not compete! So come be a part of the Pacific NW's most anticipated and exciting Beyblade X events and let it rip!

87718.title: Call of Cthulhu : Poison Soup (Doku-iri Sūpu)
87718.description:
"After going to sleep in your bed, you awake in the night to an unnerving scene. You find your self in a square room surrounded by strangers and in the center is a lone desk and chair. On the desk sits a bowl of bright red soup and a note that reads, ""If you want to leave, you have one hour to drink the poison soup, or you will be collected..."" Will you escape with your lives? Find out in this scenario straight from Japan from their number one TTRPG, Call of Cthulhu! New players welcome, pregens provided. 
---
Game Host: AJ
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: 18+

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87779.title: Neon Lords of the Toxic Wasteland: Mallpocalypse: All Sales Final
87779.description:
"Welcome to the edge of the Neon Wastes, Skumdogz. Your next paycheck squats on the rotting bones of an ancient shopping mall, a pre-war monument to consumer excess and terrible life choices. Wrecked during the Burger Wars and left to decay, the mall is now home to monsters, urban legends, and a notorious gang of mutant bicorns who rule the concourse by force.

Detroit Prime wants it cleared. Quietly was never on the table.

You are mercenaries. Scum-for-hire. Drop in, kick through flickering neon entrances, and erase everything inside with maximum prejudice. Expect warped muzak, killer machines, toxic snacks, and extreme violence.

Payment is cold hard cash… plus vouchers for a free weekly Whammy Burger meal for life.

Runs on a simple, fast-paced system. Level 2 pregenerated characters provided.

Gear up. Lock in.
The mall is open.
All sales are final.
---
Game Host: Steve Bulla
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Teen (13+)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87026.title: Driving in the 90s, a primer on importing, maintaining and driving Japanese cars on U.S. roads
87026.description: If you grew up playing the Kei Car races in Gran Tourismo, Watching the high-speed racing of Initial D, or just loving the look of cars used in the background of some of your favorite anime then this could be the panel for you! We're going to go over how to select, import, register, and maintain cars made for the Japanese market on the streets of the U.S. along with warnings about some of the pitfalls that come with it. If you saw my panel last year, this will be even more in depth and have even more information to help you make a better choice when buying a Japanese car. Including another year of ownership on the same vehicle I showed off last time. . So if you've ever found drive-thrus, ferry terminals, and automated parking garages to be just too darn convenient for you to enjoy, come to this panel by a silly guy who puts entirely too many miles on a vehicle that needs parts imported from the other side of the planet.

87520.title: Toxic Yaoi Couples: That’s the Point and Why We Love Them
87520.description: Do you ever just look at a pair of guys fighting in a fit of passion, know that they make each other worse, and/or cheer for them to kiss? Wonder what the appeal is? It’s time to dissect and discuss the who’s and why’s of what makes certain yaoi couples toxic. But more importantly celebrate why we enjoy it.

86567.title: Avatar: Seven Havens - What We Know So Far
86567.description: 20 years after the debut of Avatar: The Last Airbender, co-creators Michael Dante DiMartino and Bryan Konietzko are expanding their beloved franchise again in 2027 with another 2D animated series: Avatar: Seven Havens. Set years after The Legend of Korra, both the physical and spiritual worlds have been devastated by a cataclysm, and the Avatar is feared as humanity’s destroyer rather than its savior. The premise signals a bold new direction for the franchise. Can Avatar: Seven Havens live up to the standards of what many consider one of the greatest animated series ever, or will it face the same divisive reception as Korra, Netflix’s 2024 adaptation, and a certain 2010 film best left unnamed? Join a PNW panelist, filmmaker, and lazy cosplayer alongside fellow local fans for an interactive discussion and Q&A on what Avatar fans truly deserve—and whether we’re actually going to get it.

87121.title: Level 1 Drama/Trauma Center: Medicine in Anime
87121.description: Come learn from an anesthetist how medical practice in anime intersects and compares with real life. There will be discussion on Demon Slayer, Apothecary Diaries, Ameku MD, Young Black Jack, and more. Also a great opportunity to learn about what working in the operating room and with surgeons is really like, how to perform an anesthesia airway exam, and thoughts on what makes good and bad "CPR songs."

86637.title: The Evolution of the Magical Girl Genre: 1950 - 2010
86637.description: A survey of the Magical Girl genre from it's early beginnings in the 50's, to its codification in the 90's and explosion in the 00's. Visit the Alexandria RPG Library and explore over a thousand RPG rulebooks, modules, and player aids from countless game systems. From classic D&D to indie darlings, from cyberpunk noir to magical pirates. We bring all the dice, maps, books, and supplies for you to play in or run a game.

The Alexandria RPG Library is a 501(c)(3) non-profit based in Tacoma, Wash.

87814.title: Board Game Library - Presented by Dragonflight Game Con
87814.description:
Since 1980, Dragonflight Game Con has been introducing board game enthusiasts to a wide variety of games through their convention's extensive lending library of games. Now, you can experience that library here at Sakura-Con! Visit the Dragonflight Game Library in the Board and RPG Gaming Room, located on the Tahoma level of the Gaming Annex, to browse the collection of available games, check out a game, and play in the room's free-play area.

Dragonflight Game Con is a nonprofit, volunteer-run gaming convention that takes place every August in Bellevue, WA. Visit their website at https://dfgamecon.org/ to learn more.

86397.title: AMVs are a Joke!? How to Make Comedy AMVs
86397.description:
Presented by CMDR Sariah and Winterblade AMVs

Have you ever seen a gut-busting AMV and wanted to make one just like it? Comedy AMVs can be some of the most memorable, diverse, and uplifting videos in any contest, and they can be either very simple or very complex! This panel will use several videos as case studies to showcase the many ways to brainstorm, edit, and fine-tune a comedy AMV. By the end, you’ll know how to squeeze every giggle out of your audience!

86719.title: Cute or Creepy Romance in Anime the Final Chapter
86719.description: Back again for our fourth (and final?) year, and we've got all new clips from primarily your suggestions, but a few of our own finds as well. This is an audience participation panel, so be sure to bring your wit and romantic spirit.

85726.title: Work in Japan on the JET Program: Info Session (Panel)
85726.description: Are you interested in working in Japan? The Japan Exchange Teaching (JET) Program has brought over 80,000 participants from more than 80 countries to work in schools, boards of education, and government offices throughout Japan! The JET Program is the only teaching exchange program managed by the government of Japan. Learn more about the application process and hear from former participants about their time in Japan and the impact that the JET Program has had on their lives.Note: A bachelor’s degree is a minimum requirement for this job opportunity.

85691.title: Free Build Session
85691.description: There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

87696.title: Riftbound - Learn to Play
87696.description:
Riftbound! A TCG based off of the world of League of Legends, but this time in physical card form! A brand new game from UVS Games & Riot Games, Riftbound provides League of Legends gameplay without the searing rage of going 0/8/3 on Summoner's Rift. Unfortunately when your opponent defeats you however, you will not be able to brush it off as 'support diff'. On the other hand, if you win you experience the joy that can only be obtained from getting 22 kills as Garen while the enemy top laner prays for the surrender vote to succeed.

All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

Disclaimer: Riftbound is very new, extremely popular, and impossible to get product for, so unfortunately we will not have anything extra to send you home with, sorry!

86949.description: Join our Project Moon quiz show: Kahoot/Blooket-style questions that will put your knowledge to the test! We’ll have three categories, and the top two winners in each will walk away with prizes. Expect tough questions—you’ll need real lore-reading stamina to win. This is not a fair quiz! 86533.title: Ghost in the Shell and the Stray Dog of Anime Mamoru Oshii
86533.description: One of the most seminal anime directors to have ever lived Mamoru Oshii, has had an indelible mark on pop culture as a whole. While most famous in the United States for the 1995 Sci-Fi classic Ghost in the Shell, Oshii has created a number of other works covering ideas just as nuanced and thought provoking, with tones ranging from the melancholic to the absolutely absurd! If you are interested in exploring the underlying ideas of Ghost in the Shell, and finding other works that could possibly scratch that same itch, then join in as we discuss the career of Mamoru Oshii, a man always questioning whether our reality could really be true.

87735.title: D&D 5e (2024): Eight Kolbolds and a Baby (dragon): An Intro adventure
87735.description:
"You have been hired to find and return the egg of a friendly copper dragon.
 A band of kobolds recently stole said egg and brought it to a nearby cave to eat. But when the egg hatched, and a screeching dragon wyrmling emerged, the kobolds quickly realized they bit off more than they could chew. The kobolds then tried to appease the fussy wyrmling with treasure, but they just can’t agree on what to do next. Should they return the wyrmling to its nest? Should they raise it themselves? They don't know what to do! The choice of how best to handle these draconic thieves? Now that is up to you! 
This is a lighthearted intro meant to take 100-110 minutes and give a taste of most D&D mechanics
---
Game Host: Courtney V
Session duration: 2 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players age 6 and up)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

87770.title: Avatar Legends: The Temple of Uktoa
87770.description:
"The Earth Kingdom and the Fire Nation have both laid claim to Natsuo Island and the old temple that has been recently discovered there. Firelord Roku has asked the crew of the Unity to investigate the island and settle the matter to everyone’s satisfaction. Has the Earth Kingdom been the island’s stewards for generations as they claim? Was the temple built by Fire Nation sages to honor a dragon, as they claim? Can you get everyone to cooperate long enough to uncover the mystery of the island?

This adventure is playtest material from the upcoming Adventures of the Unity project from Magpie Games and Beadle & Grimm. Set in the era of Avatar Roku before the birth of Aang and the 100 Year War, these adventures focus on the team’s attempts to navigate rising tensions between nations that are preparing for war. No familiarity with the game or source material is required.
---
Game Host: Ryan
Session duration: 4 hours
Age rating: Everyone! (players 6 and older welcome)

This RPG session is hosted by the Alexandria RPG Library. To sign up for this game, see an Alexandria Librarian in the Board and RPG Room, located on the Tahoma floor of the Gaming Annex. Signups for each day's sessions open at 10am, and are first-come, first-served."

86639.title: The Science of Pokémon Geography
86639.description: From the volcanoes of Cinnabar Island to the caves of Mt. Moon, the geography of Pokémon hides a world of science waiting to be uncovered. Hosted by a geoscientist, we'll explore landscapes, biomes, and hazards that shape Pokémon habitats and cities. This panel blends science with worldbuilding to reveal the Pokémon world in a whole new way.

This panel blends science with worldbuilding to reveal the Pokémon world in a whole new way.

87028.title: The Secret History of Gundam Yaoi
87028.description: As the beloved Gundam franchise nears its 50th anniversary, it's only appropriate that we hearken back to the beginning of what made this war story mecha franchise so great: its extremely dedicated fujoshi audience. This panel will examine the fundamental role that female fans of Gundam played in keeping the franchise afloat and how they shaped aspects of fan culture into the present day.

86752.title: Moto Hagio: Reality, Gender and Identity
86752.description: Legendary writer and manga artist, Moto Hagio, called the "God of Shoujo Manga", has written some of the most influential stories across multiple genres but is scarcely known in popular media in the United States. This panel will discuss, in brief, some of the ground-breaking themes in her books and series that have contributed to and shaped many Japanese manga artists that followed after.

86999.title: AMQ Anime Music Quiz
86999.description:
Do you like anime music!? Do you like game shows with fabulous prizes!? Then have we got the panel for you!

For those of you who don’t already know of it: Anime Music Quiz or AMQ is an online game where a 20 second random section of an anime opening plays and within that 20 seconds you have to guess the name of the anime it belongs to! We will be selecting contestants from the audience at random and giving out all manner of prizes depending on how well you do in the quiz and what difficulty you select!

 Whether you're a casual viewer or a hardcore anime fan, there’s something for everyone, and we can’t wait to see who’ll take home the title of Anime Music Quiz Champion and the GRAND PRIZE that goes along with it! Don’t miss out – come for the anime, stay for the prizes, and get ready to have a blast!

87211.title: Girl's Intro To Cybersecurity
87211.description: Beginner-friendly panel inviting girls and young women to explore the career of cybersecurity. We'll break down the basics of the cybersecurity career, why it matters, and how anyone can get started.
